Sns.Subject: AWS Budgets: example-prod-monthly has exceeded your alert threshold
Sns.Message:
AWS Budget Notification May 04, 2026
AWS Account 123456789012

Dear AWS Customer,

You requested that we alert you when the ACTUAL Cost associated with your example-prod-monthly budget is greater than $40,000.00 for the current month. The ACTUAL Cost associated with this budget is $42,500.00.

Budget Name: example-prod-monthly
Budget Type: Cost
Budgeted Amount: $40,000.00
Alert Type: ACTUAL
Alert Threshold: > $40,000.00
ACTUAL Amount: $42,500.00
